# dysphagia.cn

> Multilingual dysphagia knowledge hub covering clinical assessment, nutrition, caregiving, and IDDSI standards. Available in Simplified Chinese (mainland China), Traditional Chinese (HK), Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), and English.

## Languages Available
- Simplified Chinese (zh-hans): /zh-hans/ — for mainland China readers
- Traditional Chinese HK (zh-hant-hk): /zh-hant-hk/ — for Hong Kong readers
- Traditional Chinese TW (zh-hant-tw): /zh-hant-tw/ — for Taiwan readers
- English (en): /en/ — for international readers

## Topic Categories
- Clinical assessment: screening tools, VFSS, FEES, manometry, geriatric dysphagia screening
- Nutrition: protein, micronutrients, texture-modified meals
- IDDSI standards: levels 0-7, testing methods, food mapping, yum cha ordering guide
- Conditions: stroke, Parkinson's, ALS/MND, dementia, head & neck cancer, multiple sclerosis, GERD, post-ICU dysphagia, cognitive impairment, presbyphagia, oral cancer, critical illness recovery, cardiac surgery
- Caregiving: mealtime techniques, equipment, family support, community nursing, carer training, hospital discharge planning
- Recipes: soft Cantonese dishes, winter melon soft recipes, HK-adapted texture-modified cooking
- zh-hant-hk conditions (2026-05-09): oral cancer swallowing rehabilitation, critical illness post-ICU dysphagia, cardiac surgery swallowing
- zh-hant-hk clinical (2026-05-09): Hong Kong public hospital SLT services guide
- Standards: T/SATA, IDDSI, NHC guidelines, food safety

## en/conditions Recent Articles (2026-05-09)
- /en/conditions/head-neck-cancer-dysphagia-management — Head and neck cancer: managing dysphagia through treatment and recovery
- /en/conditions/multiple-sclerosis-swallowing — Multiple sclerosis and dysphagia: a practical guide
- /en/conditions/gerd-aspiration-overlap — GERD and aspiration: when reflux affects swallowing safety
- /en/conditions/critical-illness-dysphagia-icu — Post-ICU dysphagia: recovery after critical illness
- /en/conditions/cognitive-impairment-safe-eating — Safe eating strategies for people with cognitive impairment
- /en/conditions/aging-presbyphagia-prevention — Presbyphagia: understanding age-related swallowing changes

- /zh-hant-hk/recipes/winter-melon-soft-recipes-hk — 冬瓜軟食食譜：香港本地適應版

Primary: CN, HK, TW | Secondary: International
